dvids.title: CENTCOM Forces Defeat Missiles, Drones Launched by Iran
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — U.S. forces intercepted multiple Iranian ballistic missiles and drones launched by Iran toward the Strait of Hormuz and Gulf neighbors, June 5.
